title: Beyond <mark>lithium</mark>: how sodium-ion batteries could change the world
abstract: Published online: 15 July 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-02150-y Batteries based on <mark>sodium</mark> ions are entering mass production. Some researchers say they could ultimately be a cheaper, safer alternative to <mark>lithium</mark> in electric cars and other energy applications.

title: Fast lithium-ion transport in polymer electrolytes with rigid polyanions
abstract: Published online: 15 July 2026; doi:10.1038/s41565-026-02229-7 The ion transport in polymer electrolytes requires a multi-scale and quantified analysis. An integrated methodology combining solid-state exchange nuclear magnetic resonance (NMR) and Markov chain analysis enables contribution analysis of distinct lithium-ion pathways in composite polymer electrolytes based on rigid polyanions, revealing fast and synergistic ion transport mechanisms.
